name: mcp-designer
description: MCP Designer is a web-based tool for designing and validating MCP servers with the MCP Design Specification (MCPDS).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-web.mjs && node scripts/copy-runtime-deps.mjs
scripts.prepack: npm run build -w @mcp-designer/core && npm run build -w @mcp-designer/web && npm run build
